description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house surrounded by a lush green yard and enclosed by a low fence. The house features a flat roof with multiple colored sections, suggesting different rooms or roof materials. Large, stylized trees are positioned at the corners and sides of the property, providing shade and visual interest. The front of the house has a small entry path leading to a central door, flanked by windows and low shrubbery. The exterior walls are primarily brick, with some areas showing lighter paneling or trim. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and driveway, indicating its placement in a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A single-story brick house with a flat, multi-colored roof, surrounded by a fenced yard and large stylized trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry path, central door, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the flat, multi-colored roof and the internal room layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back yard, additional windows, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_3: Side view showing the brick exterior, side yard, and the driveway leading up to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a short entry path, flanked by low shrubbery and no porch or overhang.
